channel.title: Coding on Lucas Avelar
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on Lucas Avelar

item.title: Coding: Baby steps towards a new form of communication
item.description: Of course, the first blog post of the Time Sensitive is about coding. Not because I love it madly, but because coding may be one of the most, if not the most important and difficult learning curves in the career of aspiring digital historians. As someone who speaks three languages, reads four, and switches back and forth between two of them throughout the day, I full heartedly believe that coding will be the hardest process of language learning I have ever experienced. And there is more than one reason for that.
